name: @handbook/built-by
description: Embeddable Built by Handbook footer credit

scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.animate.config.ts && mkdir -p dist/v1/assets && cp dist/credit.js dist/v1/credit.js && cp dist/credit-animate.js dist/v1/credit-animate.js && cp assets/hb-hover-w.json dist/v1/assets/hb-hover-w.json && rm dist/credit.js dist/credit-animate.js
